title: Poe AI Chatbot Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference guide for using Poe AI Chatbot effectively.

commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the given text.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a long article.

commands.description: Simplifies complex text for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too technical.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post about AI
commands.description: Provides creative ideas for writing a blog post.
commands.scenario: When you're brainstorming topics for your blog.

commands.description: Translates the given text into Spanish.
commands.scenario: When communicating with Spanish-speaking friends or colleagues.

commands.command: Explain this concept like I'm five
commands.description: Breaks down complex concepts into simple terms.
commands.scenario: When trying to understand or explain a difficult topic.

commands.command: Create a to-do list for moving house
commands.description: Generates a detailed to-do list for moving.
commands.scenario: When planning a move and need to organize tasks.

commands.description: Adjusts the tone of the text to be more formal.
commands.scenario: When preparing a business email or report.

commands.description: Condenses information into three key points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick summary for a presentation.

commands.command: Find recent news about climate change
commands.description: Fetches the latest news articles on climate change.
commands.scenario: When researching current events for a project.

commands.command: List pros and cons of electric cars
commands.description: Provides a balanced list of advantages and disadvantages.
commands.scenario: When considering purchasing an electric car.

commands.command: Draft a thank you note for a job interview
commands.description: Creates a polite thank you note template.
Reviews text for grammatical errors and typos.
commands.scenario: When finalizing a document or email.

commands.command: Convert this list into a paragraph
commands.description: Transforms a list format into a narrative paragraph.
commands.scenario: When needing to present list information in prose.

commands.description: Offers an inspirational quote related to motivation.
Creates an imaginative prompt for story writing.
commands.scenario: When looking for inspiration to start a new story.

commands.description: Assign a specific persona (e.g., 'Act as a senior travel agent' or 'Act as a fitness coach') to change the tone and expertise level of the responses.
Ask the bot to take a messy list or text and organize it into a clean, structured table format for better readability.
Ask the bot: 'What information do you need from me to create a perfect [Project Name]?' to let the AI guide your input.
Add 'Think step-by-step' to your prompt to force the AI to show its logic, which significantly improves accuracy in math or complex logic tasks.
Use this to quickly pull out specific names, dates, locations, or prices from a long document or email thread.
